creator: nemysis@gmx.ch
text:
- Take maintainership

Please close PR ports/173897

Makefile changed:
+DIST_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
+COMMENT=	Action flight simulation computer program, use OSG
+DESKTOP_ENTRIES=

Changed and refined:
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MJOYSTICK}
 post-install:
 pkg-plist

Generated and tested manually, tested with port test, sent with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: change, diff: ports)

How-To-Repeat: 
portlint -A
looks fine.

port test: clean
